name: Halvah Shortbread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Toasted pecans or walnuts (chopped or ground)
A few whole pecan or walnut halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cream butter and tahini together until smooth.
3. Add salt and brown sugar, blending well.
4. Gradually incorporate flour, mixing thoroughly.
5. Fold in chopped nuts.
6. Lightly grease two 7-inch pie plates or shallow baking pans.
7. Press the dough evenly into the prepared dishes to a thickness of no more than 1/4 inch.
8. Place whole nuts on top for decoration.
9. Bake for 15 minutes, then check frequently every couple of minutes.
10. Remove from oven as soon as edges are golden brown; avoid overbaking.
11. While still warm, cut into wedges and serve.
